hero.headline: We don't just assist vulnerability;
hero.subheadline: Transforming Ecuador's future through child protection, technological access to justice, and divergent thinking.
hero.body: In the heart of deep Ecuador, where adversities often challenge our resilience, an ecosystem of changemakers with years of territorial experience was born. We are not a conventional organization; we are a comprehensive social innovation lab.

dna.headline: Divergent Thinking:
dna.headlineAccent: The Architecture of a New Society.
dna.intro: We were founded in 2018 as an essential space for the historically marginalized. Our experience is based on five strategic pillars:

childhood.title: Early Childhood
childhood.text: The first 1,000 days shape a lifetime. Our CDIs provide nutritional excellence, early stimulation, and safe daily care.

rights.title: Restitution of Rights
rights.text: AFACUFA Project: We intervene in complex family crises, ensuring a protective environment for every child.

tech.title: Tech Democratization
tech.text: LeFri Platform powered by AI: free legal guidance as a universal right, just a click away.

culture.title: Youth Prevention
culture.text: Urban Fest transforms vulnerability risks into artistic power, creative skills, and neighborhood leadership.

climate.title: Climate Resilience
climate.text: Immediate response teams during contingencies and natural events affecting our coastal region.

impact.headline: Impact Traceability:
impact.body: Behind every metric, there are names, families, and rescued futures. We have years of rigorous work in the most challenging sectors, ensuring every effort focuses where it is needed most: the human being.

cdi.headline: Real Spaces of
cdi.body: Every captured smile is the result of a commitment that dignifies childhood. Explore the active work within our allied centers.

centers.gotitas: CDI Gotitas del Saber — San Miguel
centers.amiguitos: CDI Amiguitos a Jugar — Unida Norte

innovation.title: Transformative technology
innovation.body: Development ecosystems where AI and digital training empower our community.

hiphop.title: Cultural activism
hiphop.body: We turn street risks into creative energy, art, and active youth leadership.

children.title: Protecting childhood
children.body: A gallery of moments reflecting the restitution of rights and the vitality of our childhood.

workshops.title: Community workshops
workshops.body: Skill development and participatory learning to empower our local communities.

reels.title: Stories in Motion
reels.body: Feel the lingering impact. Immersive testimonies proving solidarity has a face and a voice.

volunteer.headline: Mobilizing
volunteer.body: We don't just seek presence; we seek co-authors of change—creative technologists, specialists, and entrepreneurs ready to multiply the impact. Your talent is the tool that breaks the cycle of poverty.

donation.headline: Your generosity is the platform that

anonymous.label: Silent Hero
anonymous.desc: Social impact without a public trace. Your cause leads.

personal.label: Neighborhood Hero
personal.desc: Put your name alongside those transforming communities.

institutional.label: Corporate Ally
institutional.desc: CSR and business alliances as a backbone against poverty.

slider.low: Comprehensive nutrition and educational care for our infants.
slider.mid: Youth prevention, artistic culture, and tech classrooms.
slider.high: Therapeutic support and permanent safeguard of lives.

donation.securityBadge: Secure payments processed by dLocal Go and PayPal

footer.tagline: From the neighborhood to the cloud. Transforming lives across Ecuador through innovation and social empathy.
